title: strip-down output
description: Structured output from Strip Down: the raw human desire extracted from a professional brief.

desire_statement.description: The raw human desire in blunt, honest language (1-3 sentences)

who.description: The human being or system at the center of the problem, described in private language

specific_details.description: The specific details that give the desire teeth and distinguish it from the generic version

stripped_elements.description: Professional language and anchoring details that were stripped away

concerns.description: 1-2 specific concerns about the framing that need user confirmation

confirmed.description: Whether the user has confirmed the desire statement
